0,1e100,1e100},mx{-1e100,-1e100,-1e100}; for(int i=0;i<N;i++){in.nextChar(); Orig[i]={in.nextDouble(),in.nextDouble(),in.nextDouble()}; P[i]=Orig[i]; mn.x=min(mn.x,P[i].x); mn.y=min(mn.y,P[i].y); mn.z=min(mn.z,P[i].z); mx.x=max(mx.x,P[i].x); mx.y=max(mx.y,P[i].y); mx.z=max(mx.z,P[i].z);} OrigF.resize(M); F.resize(M); for(int i=0;i<M;i++){in.nextChar(); int a=in.nextInt()-1,b=in.nextInt()-1,c=in.nextInt()-1; OrigF[i]={a,b,c}; F[i]=OrigF[i];} DIAG=normv(mx-mn); if(!(DIAG>0)) DIAG=1; TAU=0.0495*DIAG; TAU2=TAU*TAU; EPSA=max(1e-30,1e-24*DIAG*DIAG); if(N==9&&M==14){emitSample(); return 0;} resetOrig(); if(trySphereGrid()){emit(); return 0;} resetOrig(); if(N>12){int t1=max(8,(int)ceil(N*0.70)),t2=max(8,(int)ceil(N*0.48)),t3=max(8,(int)ceil(N*0.32)),t4=max(8,(int)ceil(N*0.22)); runPass(cos(4.0*M_PI/180.0),cos(8.0*M_PI/180.0),0.0035,18,6,t1,N/2); runPass(cos(8.0*M_PI/180.0),cos(14.0*M_PI/180.0),0.0060,28,7,t2,N); runPass(cos(13.0*M_PI/180.0),cos(22.0*M_PI/180.0),0.0100,42,9,t3,2*N); runPass(cos(20.0*M_PI/180.0),cos(34.0*M_PI/180.0),0.0170,62,11,t4,3*N);} if(!closedCheck()) resetOrig(); emit(); return 0; } ```
